name: Every Village Needs Grandchildren
overview: Shows the challenges of 'city puppies' to becoming grandchildren of a rural village. Shows how they gradually become accustomed to life in a rural village as they help the elderly with chores, show off their long skills, and even eat and work together at a country table full of their tastes.

trailers.title: [스페셜 클립] 한 잔 시원하게 들이켜! | 우리 마을 똥강아지🐶 | TEO
